title: GUI
description: A clean GUI resource pack for Minecraft with transparent menus and a modern minimalist design.
body:
# GUI by Chronicaly
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/799e7ee873e5e634ec20f306c99818957a8bdab2.jpeg)
## Description

GUI by Chronicaly is a refined PvP-focused resource pack interface built for players who want a clean, no-distraction experience. Designed with clarity and simplicity in mind, this pack replaces Minecraft’s default interface with a sleek, performance-friendly layout—perfect for competitive and casual players alike.

* Minimalistic menus, buttons, and hotbar
* Streamlined inventory for fast looting and crafting
* Optimized visuals for duels, UHC, and fast-paced PvP
* Soft neutral tones that are easy on the eyes
* Complements any pack focused on PvP or Vanilla style

---

## Features

* Fully redesigned GUI and HUD (inventory, chests, settings, etc.)
* Clean hotbar, health, armor, and status indicators
* Perfect pairing for custom PvP textures or vanilla visuals
## Installation Guide

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Move it into your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder
3. Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Enable GUI in resourcepacks

---

## Feedback & Community

Have suggestions, bug reports, or want to chat with other players using the pack?
Join the community here: [https://discord.gg/factory](https://discord.gg/factory)

---
